hd4f61e1aga3f1g414dg960cg903f4fc54c6f: Now it's back to the road, I suppose. It never ends, does it?
h1f34d55bge543g4f0agafb4gd3ad1513f53b: I'm glad you came through it alive. We owe you, more than we can repay.
hc7dada35g81dbg4bdag822dga0ab5dadd7b5: Don't worry - we'll be ready when they come.
h817ccf7dge955g45beg8c5bg66efd45ba3cf: Don't spare the fire-arrows. Let's see if goblins are prettier with a coat of burning oil on.
h07db8a2dg443fg4a43g97d5g4f929b66d3d8: Don't spare the fire-arrows. Let's see if goblins are prettier with a coat of burning oil on.
hc5cf8cadg3b5cg4f51gb199gab9da51dfea6: You want to use flaming arrows? In a wood grove?
h3949ec7agd9c8g4ea3g9204g07a16e7edcec: What I want is to kill goblins. This place is better off a pile of ash than their latrine pit.
h6e4adfb7g4873g462egaf1dg1c60518c9ed8: I've seen death by fire before. Not a pleasant way to go.
h18d992ecgf878g4427ga0bcg6e9c3d3f44e6: Sounds a fine one to me, so long as it's goblins doing the dying.
hfa0f12b1gc062g4658gbbebg088476c22dfe: Those barrels make a fine target - one strike could set you alight.
hedb7b91bg58adg401eg928cge2fa81caff75: I'm not afraid of fire. They call us 'hellspawn' - maybe it's time they face a bit of hell in return.
